name: Pineapple Fritters with Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Fritters: Combine in order given: egg, milk, sugar, baking powder, crushed pineapple, and butter. Add flour gradually until the batter is smooth. Pour in the remaining flour last. Stir gently to combine.
Drop a tablespoon at a time into hot deep fat. Cook until golden brown on both sides.
Sauce: Combine all ingredients in a saucepan over medium heat. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes or until the mixture thickens and clears. Pour over fritters before serving.
